channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Retribution: Elections in Indiana, Ohio, Michigan
item.description: Donald Trump's efforts to influence Republicans who oppose him continue Tuesday night in Indiana, with key state senate races.

item.title: Shooting at Dallas-area shopping center leaves two dead, suspect detained
item.description: Two people were killed in a shooting at a shopping center near Dallas. Police report the suspect is now in custody.

item.title: Coast Guard seeks information about sailboat in Lynette Hooker probe
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard is investigating a sailboat potentially moored near Lynette Hooker's vessel the night of her disappearance.

item.title: LIVE: Secretary Rubio Addresses Iran Conflict - ABC News
item.description: Continuous coverage of current events and live broadcasts.
